geographicPolicy.distancePrecision: Coordinates are evaluated at full source precision; distanceMeters is rounded to 0.1 m for storage.

notes: The counts describe the reproducible discovery net, not a claim that every mapped cafe or fast-food venue publishes a daily lunch.
Ways and relations are classified using the center returned by Overpass. A future production refresh should retain source geometry and review features close to 2000 m.
reviewedCandidates is the source-reviewed onboarding shortlist, not the entire Overpass result.

statusVocabulary.adapter_ready: Official source has a stable shape and enough date or closure context for an adapter.
statusVocabulary.adapter_candidate: Public source is useful, but freshness confirmation needs extra safeguards.
statusVocabulary.manual_review: Automation cannot safely confirm today's menu from the reviewed public source.
statusVocabulary.unsupported: No reliable dish-level lunch source was found or the venue does not currently offer the relevant lunch.
statusVocabulary.outside_radius: The venue was found in the 3 km discovery net but its Haversine distance exceeds 2 km.

reviewedCandidates.name: Addfood / Tellus Restaurang

menuSource.observedShape: Week-number heading, Swedish weekday sections, prices/allergen markers, and explicit closure text.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The page advertised week 33 while also stating summer closure during weeks 29-32; an adapter must prefer the closure for the current Stockholm week and must not expose the future menu early.

reviewedCandidates.name: Restaurang Landet

menuSource.observedShape: Today's Swedish weekday block plus a full-week section and explicit closure messaging.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The official source explicitly said lunch was closed and would return 24 August. This is a verified closed state, not a missing-menu failure.

reviewedCandidates.name: Krubb Telefonplan

menuSource.observedShape: Location details and a static all-day menu; no explicit date or current lunch-day marker.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The source is authoritative for dishes and prices but cannot confirm that a changing menu is current today. Do not label it confirmed-current without a separate publication signal.

reviewedCandidates.name: Tokai Sushi Telefonplan

menuSource.observedShape: Client-rendered menu with a lunch-mode toggle and a Telefonplan location page; no date-bearing daily publication was found.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: A static lunch offer can be extracted, but it should remain unconfirmed unless the source supplies a current-day or current-week signal.

reviewedCandidates.name: Thai Wok Orkidé

menuSource.observedShape: Closure text is HTML, while dishes are image-based and not identified as a dated lunch menu.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The official site stated closure from 4 July through 8 August. Closure detection is feasible, but dish OCR would not establish today's menu reliably.

reviewedCandidates.name: Sushibar Masahiro

menuSource.observedShape: Search indexing showed structured lunch dishes and prices, but the source hostname did not resolve during direct verification.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The previously indexed source could not be retrieved because its hostname did not resolve. It must not be automated or treated as current unless the official source returns.

reviewedCandidates.name: Restaurang Nygammalt

menuSource.observedShape: ISO-like week number, Swedish weekday sections, dish descriptions, prices, and always-available dishes.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The source still displayed week 29 when Stockholm had entered week 30. A correct adapter should classify that publication as stale, not confirmed.

reviewedCandidates.name: Indian Lotus

menuSource.observedShape: Swedish weekday lunch sections, dishes, prices, dietary cues, and allergens, but no week/date.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The stable weekday rotation is useful, but absence of a date means the menu should not be marked confirmed-current solely because retrieval succeeded.

reviewedCandidates.name: The Meeting Restaurant

menuSource.observedShape: Official page confirms weekday lunch-buffet hours; dish data is a client-side Firestore-fed general menu without a date-bearing lunch section.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The public source verifies that lunch exists, but not what the lunch buffet contains today.

reviewedCandidates.name: Pita i Parken Midsommarkransen

menuSource.observedShape: Static food menu, current seasonal opening-hours notice, and links to official ordering.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The page had summer-specific opening hours, but did not publish a dated daily lunch. Treat menu dishes as a general lunch option, never as a confirmed daily special.

reviewedCandidates.name: Tellus Pizza

menuSource.observedShape: Structured all-day dishes, prices, vegan section, and opening hours; no dated lunch publication.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: Suitable as a general daytime menu only if the product models that separately from today's confirmed lunch specials.

reviewedCandidates.name: Café Elektra

menuSource.observedShape: The official site verifies the restaurant and lunch service; a third party publishes weekday dishes, but publisher authority and date freshness are unclear.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: Do not automate from the third-party page until the restaurant confirms it as its publishing channel.

reviewedCandidates.name: Restaurang Spiskroken

menuSource.observedShape: Current week heading, Swedish weekdays, dishes, price, and explicit closure text on a dedicated restaurant profile.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The profile looked actively maintained and carried current closure information, but ownership of the publishing channel was not independently verified. Confirm with the restaurant before treating it as authoritative.

reviewedCandidates.name: WKB Västberga

menuSource.observedShape: Week heading, weekday sections, price, address, and explicit multi-week closure text.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The source stated vacation closure during weeks 28-31. That is a reliable closed status for Stockholm week 30.

reviewedCandidates.name: The Swan

menuSource.observedShape: Official location and opening-hours page with a general menu link; no date-bearing daily lunch publication was found.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The stale OSM website tag pointed to theswan.nu, which did not resolve; the current official site is theswan.se. No confirmed daily lunch source was located.

reviewedCandidates.name: Restaurant Kransen

menuSource.observedShape: General Italian menu without a dated lunch publication.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The mapped and independently indexed weekday opening time was 15:00, so it should not be promoted as a weekday lunch source without newer official evidence. Weekend daytime service is a separate use case.

reviewedCandidates.name: Vintervikens Trädgårdskafé

menuSource.observedShape: Official site confirms daily lunch and current opening hours, while specific changing food is communicated through event pages and official social channels.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: Lunch availability is verified, but no stable date-bearing daily dish source was found. Event menus must not be mistaken for ordinary lunch.

reviewedCandidates.name: Västertorps Hjärta

menuSource.observedShape: Week-numbered lunch, Swedish weekday sections, dish descriptions, price, and inclusions.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The source displayed week 26 while Stockholm was in week 30. The extractable content is demonstrably stale and must never be shown as today's confirmed lunch.

reviewedCandidates.name: Bastard Burgers Liljeholmen

menuSource.observedShape: City-level daily-lunch page, restaurant list, location-specific full menu, and explicit seasonal availability message.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: The official lunch page explicitly said there was no daily lunch during summer. The location remains open with its regular menu, but no lunch special should be inferred.

reviewedCandidates.name: Caffè Nero Liljeholmen
reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: Excluded by coordinate distance even though it is only 0.9 m beyond the formal boundary at source precision. This close result should be rechecked whenever source coordinates change.

reviewedCandidates.name: Thai Rung Liljeholmen

menuSource.observedShape: Official site confirms a lunch service but does not expose a date-bearing daily menu.

reviewedCandidates.observedAtResearch: Excluded solely by the 2 km Haversine rule, not by neighborhood name, search ranking, or source quality.
